prompting.responds_best_to: Explicit, well-structured instructions with examples; spell out the output format.
prompting.avoid: Assuming frontier-level instruction-following — under-specified prompts drift.
prompting.system_prompt_prefix: Follow the instructions and output format exactly; do not add commentary.

quirks: Open-weights — endpoint, auth, and exact model string depend on the host (Ollama, Groq, Together, vLLM); configure per deployment
Weaker instruction-following than frontier models — provide examples
Best value when data must stay local/private

handoff.output_format_instruction: Demand strict format with an example; for local hosts confirm the chat template is applied.
handoff.evaluation_notes: Verify format and completeness; escalate reasoning-heavy legs to a frontier model.
